text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru and I have come to a local
shrine, but before I can do any sort of praying...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: So, are you ready?! Don't hold back...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Cleanse me of all evil spirits, I beg you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well, I haven't been feeling too great lately. Then
yesterday, the great Shiraoki appeared before me
and said...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
"Have your destined partner cleanse you of evil
spirits. Only then will you be able to take the next
step."

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So please, I'm begging you! My oh-so-divine
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yippee! I knew I could rely on you! They don't call
you "Trusty Trainer" for nothing!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Now, repeat after me! Ready, and...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Squishy toe beans! Meow!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh my... Whoooa!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Guess who's been reborn! Me! ☆

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: See! My aura's completely different, right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What a relief! No more days cowering in the face
of bad luck! And not only that...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Pfft, hahaha! That meow just now was priceless!
Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: That was so funny, I could listen to that forev—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Uh... hehe...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh! You wouldn't happen to be hungry, would
you?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Cleansing evil spirits really works up your
appetite! Why don't we head back and grab
something to eat?! Yeah, let's do that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have mixed feelings about this, but at least
Matikanefukukitaru has her energy back.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Meow? Mew mew...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Meow?! Meooow?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru is desperately trying to
communicate with her eyes!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Meow! Meow meow! (I think I've been possessed
by a cat!)

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Meow, meow meow meow! (It's probably angry
about the cleansing ritual... Now it's gone and
taken charge of my body!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From the looks of it, she's angered an evil spirit
enough for it to reveal itself.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Meowwwww!
(Nooo! What do I dooo?!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I pull out all the stops to calm her down. She's
soon back to speaking normally, but nothing can
fix her mood.
